title: The Psychology of Memory
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: Memory is a complex mental process involving the (0) storage of information. Cognitive scientists have identified various factors that can (17) our ability to recall facts.
